evals.prompt: Create a ragbits agent called python-tutor that helps users learn Python programming by answering questions and providing code examples
evals.expected_output: A python-tutor/ directory with pyproject.toml, README.md, python_tutor/__init__.py, python_tutor/agent.py (Agent + Prompt + LiteLLM + tools import + interactive main), and python_tutor/tools.py (TOOLS list). System prompt is specific to Python tutoring. Dependencies installed.

assertions.name: project_directory_created
assertions.description: python-tutor/ directory exists

assertions.name: agent_file_exists
assertions.description: python_tutor/agent.py exists and contains Agent, LiteLLM, and Prompt imports

assertions.name: tools_file_exists
assertions.description: python_tutor/tools.py exists and contains a TOOLS list

assertions.name: init_file_exists
assertions.description: python_tutor/__init__.py exists (makes it a valid package)

assertions.name: pyproject_has_ragbits
assertions.description: pyproject.toml exists and lists ragbits as a dependency

assertions.name: system_prompt_is_domain_specific
assertions.description: The system_prompt in agent.py is specific to Python tutoring — not a generic placeholder

assertions.name: readme_exists
assertions.description: README.md exists with run instructions

assertions.name: unwraps_agent_result_content
assertions.description: agent.py reads result.content from the AgentResult — does not return or print the AgentResult object directly

evals.prompt: Create a ragbits agent called data-analyst that can read CSV files, compute basic statistics (mean, median, std), and return a summary report
evals.expected_output: A data-analyst/ directory scaffolded as above. tools.py contains tool functions related to CSV reading and stats computation. System prompt is specific to data analysis. Dependencies installed.

assertions.name: project_directory_created
assertions.description: data-analyst/ directory exists

assertions.name: agent_file_exists
assertions.description: data_analyst/agent.py exists

assertions.name: tools_reflect_domain
assertions.description: tools.py contains at least one tool function related to CSV, data, statistics, or file reading (not just example_tool unchanged)

assertions.name: system_prompt_is_domain_specific
assertions.description: The system_prompt references data analysis, CSV, statistics, or reporting

assertions.name: pyproject_has_ragbits
assertions.description: pyproject.toml lists ragbits as a dependency

assertions.name: readme_exists
assertions.description: README.md exists

assertions.name: unwraps_agent_result_content
assertions.description: agent.py reads result.content from the AgentResult — does not return or print the AgentResult object directly

evals.prompt: Create a ragbits orchestrator agent called coordinator that discovers and coordinates remote agents via A2A protocol. It should look for agents at localhost:8000 and localhost:8001
evals.expected_output: A coordinator/ directory. agent.py includes A2A agent discovery, an execute_agent tool, and an orchestrator prompt. pyproject.toml depends on ragbits[a2a]. Dependencies installed.

assertions.name: project_directory_created
assertions.description: coordinator/ directory exists

assertions.name: agent_file_exists
assertions.description: coordinator/agent.py exists

assertions.name: a2a_dependency_extra
assertions.description: pyproject.toml depends on ragbits[a2a] specifically (not just ragbits) — the a2a extra is required for fastapi/uvicorn/a2a-sdk

assertions.name: execute_agent_tool_present
assertions.description: agent.py or tools.py contains an execute_agent function or similar remote-agent-calling tool

assertions.name: agent_discovery_present
assertions.description: Code includes endpoint configuration for localhost:8000 and localhost:8001, or dynamic agent discovery

assertions.name: system_prompt_is_orchestrator
assertions.description: System prompt describes an orchestrator/coordinator role, not a generic assistant

assertions.name: correct_a2a_imports
assertions.description: If A2A server code is present, imports are from ragbits.agents.a2a.server (create_agent_server) and get_agent_card is called as an Agent method — not imported as a free function
